title: RF elements HG4-CC-S30, Symmetrical Horn antenna, 5GHz, 30°
category: RF elements / Wireless / Antennas / Sector antennas / 5GHz
description: The RF elements HG4-CC-S30 is a 5GHz sector horn antenna featuring a 30° symmetrical beamwidth , 18dBi gain and (2) N female connectors . The antenna operates in the 5100-6775MHz frequency range. Thanks to its minimal side lobes, it provides an excellent signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and its compact size makes it suitable for deployment in environments with a high density of transmitters
